perps_third_party_product.reason: App Perps / third-party derivatives require separate API ownership, credential scope, metadata, positions, funding, settlement, lifecycle, and reconciliation design.

contract_product.reason: Blockchain.com Exchange v3 API used by this adapter does not expose standard futures, perpetual, or options contracts.

official_sources.evidence: The Exchange v3 API used by this adapter is scoped to exchange spot endpoints.
Blockchain.com app Perps are treated as a separate app/third-party product surface and are not equivalent to Exchange v3 standard contracts.

runtime_isolation: Do not route Blockchain.com app Perps or third-party derivatives through the Exchange Spot adapter until ownership, API surface, account scope, product metadata, private order lifecycle, positions, funding, settlement, and reconciliation are audited.
required_audit_gaps: separate product/API ownership and host policy
account and credential scope for perps access
perps market metadata, positions, funding, and settlement fixtures
